headline: Nike to report third quarter earning amid turnaround momentum: Jefferies
summary: Nike Inc (NYSE:NKE, XETRA:NKE) is set to report its fiscal third quarter results on Tuesday, with Jefferies analysts highlighting that the report comes amid steady progress in the athletic apparel and footwear company’s ongoing turnaround strategy. headline: Is It Time To Reassess Nike (NKE) After The Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: If you are wondering whether NIKE's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. The recent moves have many investors reassessing what they think the stock is actually worth. Over the last week the share price return was around a 2.5% decline, with a 30 day return of a 17.4% decline and a 1 year return of a 17.0% decline, which may signal that expectations and perceived risk around the stock have shifted. Recent headlines have focused on NIKE's brand strength, product...

headline: Jobs Report, Nike Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: The second quarter of the year begins on Wednesday. The March jobs report, the direction of the Iran war and an appearance by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will be closely watched. Auto executives will also gather in New York for a conference where higher gasoline prices will be top of mind.
